---
title: webR adapter test fixture
filters: [../_extensions/blendtutor/blendtutor.lua]
---

## webR Shared-Boot Adapter Test

### Exercise 1: Variable Assignment

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Assign x to 5 and print it.

```r
x <- 5
print(x)
```
:::

### Exercise 2: Shelter Isolation

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Check if x exists (should be FALSE — per-run Shelter isolation).

```r
print(exists("x"))
```
:::

<script type="module">
  import { scanExercises, buildRegistry, start } from "../_extensions/blendtutor/assets/exercise-runtime.js";
  import { createWebRAdapter } from "../_extensions/blendtutor/assets/webr-adapter.js";

  const adapter = createWebRAdapter({
    onBootProgress: (msg) => console.log("[webr-boot]", msg),
  });
  const registry = buildRegistry(scanExercises());
  window.__btWebRAdapter = adapter;
  start(registry, adapter);
</script>
